name: Hydrating Face Cleanser
description: A gentle, pH-balanced cleanser that removes impurities while preserving your skin's natural moisture barrier. Formulated with glycerin and hyaluronic acid for deep hydration.
howToUse: Apply a small amount to damp skin, massage gently in circular motions for 60 seconds, then rinse with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening.

name: Niacinamide Serum 10%
description: A lightweight, fast-absorbing serum that targets enlarged pores, uneven skin tone, and excess oil production. Clinical-grade niacinamide at an effective concentration.
howToUse: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin after toning. Pat gently into skin. Follow with moisturizer. Use morning and evening.

name: Barrier Repair Moisturizer
description: A rich yet non-greasy moisturizer that repairs and strengthens the skin barrier. Contains ceramides and squalane for long-lasting hydration and protection.
howToUse: Apply a pea-sized amount to face and neck after serum. Gently press into skin. Use morning and evening.

name: Salicylic Acid Exfoliant 2%
description: A targeted BHA treatment that penetrates deep into pores to dissolve excess sebum and dead skin cells. Reduces breakouts and prevents future congestion.
howToUse: Apply a thin layer to affected areas after cleansing. Start with every other day, gradually increasing to daily use. Always follow with SPF.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: A stabilized 15% L-Ascorbic Acid serum that brightens dull skin, fades dark spots, and provides antioxidant protection against environmental damage.
howToUse: Apply 4-5 drops to clean, dry skin in the morning. Wait 1-2 minutes before applying moisturizer and sunscreen.

name: Mineral Sunscreen SPF 50
description: A lightweight, non-greasy mineral sunscreen with broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection. Leaves no white cast and works beautifully under makeup.
howToUse: Apply generously as the last step of your morning routine. Reapply every 2 hours when exposed to sun.

name: Gentle Exfoliating Toner
description: A daily-use AHA/BHA toner that gently resurfaces skin to reveal a smoother, more radiant complexion. Balanced formula suitable for regular use.
howToUse: Soak a cotton pad and sweep across face and neck after cleansing. Avoid eye area. Use in the evening.

name: Retinol Night Treatment 0.5%
description: A time-released retinol formula that accelerates cell turnover while minimizing irritation. Targets fine lines, wrinkles, and uneven texture while you sleep.
howToUse: Apply a pea-sized amount to clean, dry skin at night. Start 2x per week and build up. Always use SPF the following morning.
